android.title: Update available
android.message: A new Balyria build is available. Please update from Google Play when the Update button appears.
android.trustMessage: Your local finance data stays protected on this device.
android.helperText: If Google Play still shows Open, wait a few minutes and reopen the Play Store testing page.
android.footerText: Build updates keep your planner accurate and secure.

ios.title: Update available

ios.trustMessage: Your local finance data stays protected on this device.
ios.helperText: Open the App Store when this update becomes available.
ios.footerText: Build updates keep your planner accurate and secure.
